documents.original_prompt: 3. Texture and Space This is where you tell the AI where the music is happening. Do you want it to sound like it was recorded in a bedroom or a stadium? Use tags like [Dry Vocals] or [Large Hall Reverb].
documents.translated_prompt: 这是你告诉AI音乐发生在哪里的地方。你希望它听起来像是在卧室还是体育场录制的？使用标签如 [Dry Vocals] 或 [Large Hall Reverb]。

title.en: 3. Texture and Space This is where you tell the AI

prompt.en: 3. Texture and Space This is where you tell the AI where the music is happening. Do you want it to sound like it was recorded in a bedroom or a stadium? Use tags like [Dry Vocals] or [Large Hall Reverb].
prompt.zh: 这是你告诉AI音乐发生在哪里的地方。你希望它听起来像是在卧室还是体育场录制的？使用标签如 [Dry Vocals] 或 [Large Hall Reverb]。

documents.gem_suggestion: 使用大型厅堂混响来增加空间感，保持动态范围宽广，以营造丰富的纹理和空间效果。
